mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsRecomendClDao.selectList */ select cc.code as recomend_cl_cd , cc.code_nm as recomend_cl_nm , cc.code_type as recomend_cl_type_cd , case when ubrc.bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_bsns_recomend_cl ubrc on ubrc.recomend_cl_type_cd = cc.code_type and ubrc.recomend_cl_cd = cc.code and ubrc.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.enabled = true and cc.code_type in ('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_BSR}', '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_FNTN}') order by cc.code_type desc, cc.sort_order
